abilities.description: Put a plague counter on CARDNAME or remove a plague counter from it.

effect.description: Put a plague counter on CARDNAME or remove a plague counter from it.
effect.name: AddOrRemoveCounter

triggers.description: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a plague counter on CARDNAME.
When CARDNAME has three or more plague counters on it, sacrifice it. If you do, destroy all nonland permanents.
